name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_analysis_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the following content for SEO effectiveness and suggest improvements: {content_data}
prompts.use_case: Enhancing website landing pages to improve conversion rates.

prompts.name: cro_recommendation_prompt
prompts.template: Given these analytics insights: {analytics_data}, suggest strategies to improve conversion rates.
prompts.use_case: Generating SEO-friendly marketing copy for product launches.

prompts.name: copywriting_prompt
prompts.template: Create engaging marketing copy focused on {marketing_goal} using these keywords: {keywords}.
prompts.use_case: Conducting SEO audits to identify content gaps and keyword opportunities.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_prompt
prompts.template: Develop a growth engineering plan based on user behavior analytics: {analytics_data}.
prompts.use_case: Using web traffic and user analytics data to inform growth hacking tactics.
